Axis Moves 2026 Registration Opens.title: Axis Moves 2026 Registration Opens
Axis Moves 2026 Registration Opens.summary:
• Axis Bank, in collaboration with InsideIIM, has launched MOVES 2026, its flagship national-level business competition aimed at identifying and nurturing the next generation of business leaders from premier institutions across India.
• The competition is designed to help participants think beyond analysis and make decisions through real-world business scenarios. Students will tackle practical business challenges, navigate complex trade-offs, build innovative solutions, and demonstrate leadership and strategic thinking.
• Open to students from all programmes
• Solve real-world business case studies
